verse_text: Now while they were going, behold, some of the guard came into the city and reported to the chief priests all the things that had happened.

links.context: "The ignorance of Scripture is a great cliff and a deep abyss. It is impossible for anyone to be without benefit if he reads continually and with attention" (JohnChr). Furthermore, the rebellious were not persuaded even when people did rise from the dead ([[MAT.28:11]]-15; [[JOH.12:9]]-11).
